ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Customer's contact number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's physical address */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the internet plan subscribed */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager handling the customer's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES account_managers ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_managers" (
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account manager */,
  "account_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the account manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the account manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the account manager started */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account manager (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., OnlineSecurity, StreamingTV) */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "monthly_fee" REAL /* Monthly fee for the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of the service (e.g., security, streaming, backup) */,
  "is_addon" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is an addon to a plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer subscribing to the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was activated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ends */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was last renewed */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Renewal status (e.g., pending, renewed, cancelled) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., DSL, Fiber optic) */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "cost" REAL /* Monthly cost of the plan */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Internet speed for the plan */,
  "data_limit" TEXT /* Data limit for the plan */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the plan is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)
